description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet or shelving unit with a modern design, featuring a combination of closed and open storage spaces. The upper section consists of four open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decor, or other items, while the lower section is enclosed by two doors, providing concealed storage. The exterior is finished in a light wood grain texture, with the doors and shelving surfaces in a contrasting light beige or off-white color. The cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The doors appear to have small, subtle handles for opening, and the overall construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood or laminate. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, modern cabinet with four open shelves above and two closed doors below, finished in light wood and beige tones. It stands on angled legs and combines both display and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two closed doors and the clean, flat facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the cabinet's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view with all four open shelves visible above the two closed doors, revealing the full storage layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wood grain texture and slimness.
